title: thymopsis thymoides var. glabrescens
intro: Thymopsis thymoides var. glabrescens, also known as the Thyme-leaved Marigold, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thymopsis thymoides var. glabrescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
